label: Generation-time watermarking

node.label: Generation-time watermarking
node.definition: Generation-time watermarking modifies sampling or output structure to embed a statistically detectable signal associated with an AI generator.
node.why_it_matters: It can support origin claims, synthetic-data filtering, and forensic analysis without trusting a generic AI-content classifier.
limitations: Paraphrasing, editing, translation, collusion, and distribution shift can weaken detection or create false accusations.

dependencies.rationale: Generation-time watermarking measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Autoregressive decoding.
Generation-time watermarking measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Information theory.
Generation-time watermarking measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Adversarial robustness & security testing.
